comment: We have dealt with this supplier for 3 years. Delivery is consistent and fabric quality matches the samples.
Good supplier, communication could be better but overall satisfied with the last three orders.
The yarn quality was below spec on the last lot. They offered a partial refund which was fair.
Ordered 500 metres of cotton fabric, quality matched samples exactly. Will reorder next season.
Payment terms are flexible and pricing is transparent. Recommended for bulk orders.
Delivery was delayed by two weeks with no communication. Otherwise the fabric was acceptable.
Highly recommend for dyeing units sourcing greige cloth. Their lead times are reliable.
The printing finish on the polyester blend was slightly uneven but they reprinted without extra charge.
Sales team is responsive on WhatsApp, though invoice turnaround could be faster.
Been sourcing viscose yarn for my retail chain from them since 2022. No complaints.
Samples were good but bulk delivery had shade variation. They replaced the affected rolls.
Professional packaging, clean invoicing, GST compliant. Nothing to complain about.
Quality is decent for the price point. Suitable for mid-range retail but not premium.
Had minor issues with packing on the first shipment but they sorted it quickly. Continuing with them.
Two of the bales had moisture damage. Claim was processed within a week.
BEST EVER!!! 5 STARS!!!
Worst company never deal again total waste

Madarchod company hai, order ke baad phone uthana band kar diya.
Bhenchod kya ghatiya quality di hai, full waste.
Ekdum harami log hain, dhokha dete hain naye customers ko.

Ek dam gando malik, besharmo quality no koi dhyan nathi.
Thagbaz log chhe, advance leine maal nathi aapto.
Gheli team chhe, koi response nathi apta WhatsApp par.
Ekdam chor kampani ahe, paise gele ani saman nahi aala.
Haramkhor malak aahe, WhatsApp block kela order nantar.
Dhongekhor supplier, samples chan pan bulk ekdum nakli.
Pura haramzaada owner hai, paise lekar bhag gaya.

Romba mokkai company, pannatha vangatheenga.

Donga company, advance teesukoni saman ivvaledu.

Bokachoda supplier, samples ar bulk match korena.
The finish quality has been declining over the last two quarters. May need to find an alternative.
Not perfect but acceptable for cost-sensitive orders. Premium buyers should look elsewhere.
Their export packing meets international norms. Shipped to Dubai without any documentation issues.
